title: Ankle sprain - aftercare
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Rest, ice, compression or brace use, and elevation are common early home-care steps.
Patients should protect the ankle and gradually return to activity.
Return precautions include worsening pain, swelling, numbness, color change, fever, or inability to walk.
